description_long: This object depicts three adult pedestrians standing side by side, each with distinct urban streetwear. The left figure wears a sleeveless jersey over a t-shirt and loose pants, with visible arm tattoos and a cap. The center figure is dressed in a baggy jacket, loose pants, and a beanie, presenting a bulkier silhouette. The right figure sports a long-sleeve checkered shirt over a t-shirt and cargo pants, with a more slender build and short hair. All three figures have relaxed, upright postures and are outfitted in casual, layered clothing typical of an urban environment. The clothing styles suggest a blend of athletic and casual street fashion, with accessories like caps and beanies adding to the urban aesthetic. The figures are detailed with visible facial features, hand positions, and realistic proportions, making them suitable for populating city scenes.
description: Three adult pedestrians in urban streetwear, each with distinct casual outfits and accessories, standing upright side by side. The group features a mix of athletic and casual styles, including a jersey, jacket, and checkered shirt.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three pedestrians' faces, clothing details, and accessories like caps and beanies.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profiles and silhouettes of the three figures, with visible layering of clothing and headwear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the pedestrians, including the jersey number, jacket, and shirt details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profiles and the fit of the clothing from the side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual streetwear including a sleeveless jersey, baggy jacket, and long-sleeve checkered shirt with loose pants
